_rules: Encounter portions come FROM daily allocation, never extra.
Multi-animal habitats use golf-ball pieces (~1 inch).
Pellet (Mazuri / Missouri) is a component, not a base.
Hay-only is Sulcata only — other tortoises have different diets.

species.what_this_animal_is: Largest rodent — South American wetlands, social grazer
species.prep_rule: Hay first. Pellet weighed per SOP. Greens whole-leaf, not chopped.
species.source_line: v23 catalog · Grazer rodent class · Master Doc 'Hay-Eating Animals'
species.morning_feed: Whole hay base. Mazuri herbivore pellet. Whole-leaf greens.
species.encounter_portion: Whole-leaf green or hay strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: Hay first. Small pellet ration weighed. Greens whole-leaf.
species.morning_feed: Whole hay (timothy, grass) as base. Small pellet ration. Whole-leaf greens.
species.encounter_portion: Whole-leaf green or hay strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Domestic rabbit — strict herbivore, hindgut fermenter
species.prep_rule: Timothy hay first. Carrot is a treat, not a daily food. No iceberg.
species.source_line: v23 catalog · Grazer class · House Rabbit Society standards
species.morning_feed: Whole timothy hay as base. Small pellet ration. Whole-leaf greens.
species.encounter_portion: Whole-leaf green for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Macropod — Tasmania / SE Australia, hay-eating browser
species.prep_rule: Hay first. Pellet weighed. NO bread, NO sugary guest treats.
species.source_line: v23 catalog · Grazer macropod class · Master Doc PART 4 'Hay-Eating Animals'
species.morning_feed: Whole hay base. Macropod pellet ration. Whole-leaf greens.
species.encounter_portion: Whole-leaf green or hay strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Slow arboreal folivore — neotropical rainforest canopy
simple_build: Mazuri leaf-eater chow as the base
Browse branches WITH stems left on
species.prep_rule: Stems ARE enrichment — leave them on. Chow base is non-negotiable.
species.three_second_check: Is the chow base there? Stems left on?
species.source_line: v23 PART 4 §9 · Folivore class · Restored from drift v2026-04-25d
species.morning_feed: Mazuri leaf-eater chow as base. Whole-leaf greens. Browse — stems ARE enrichment.
species.encounter_portion: Single leaf for slow hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

simple_build: Fruit primary in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch)
species.prep_rule: Many small pieces, not few large. Mazuri primate chow daily as small ration.
species.three_second_check: Is fruit dominant? Is the chow there?
species.source_line: v23 catalog · primate class · USDA + Harris County primate licensing
species.morning_feed: Fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch). Whole-leaf greens. Mazuri primate chow daily.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized fruit cubes (½ inch). Drawn from daily allocation, not extra.

species.what_this_animal_is: Arboreal procyonid — Central / South American rainforest
simple_build: Soft fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch)
Trace cooked egg or insect protein
species.prep_rule: Soft fruit only. Pieces ~1 inch. Pellet weighed.
species.three_second_check: Is fruit soft and small? Pellet visible?
species.morning_feed: Mazuri Frugivore Diet. Soft fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch). Trace egg/insect protein.
species.encounter_portion: Single fruit cube (½ inch) for tong or hand. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Arboreal porcupine — South American forest canopy
species.prep_rule: Leaves whole. Browse with stems. Sweet potato slice as occasional supplement only.
species.morning_feed: Whole-leaf greens. Browse with stems. Mazuri leaf-eater chow ration.
species.encounter_portion: Single leaf for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Largest toucan — South American forest edge
simple_build: Mazuri low-iron softbill chow weighed first
Low-sugar fruit only in ½-inch cubes
NO citrus / NO banana / NO mango
species.prep_rule: Iron storage disease prevention is the mission. Citrus boosts iron absorption — never serve.
species.three_second_check: Is the chow low-iron? No citrus / no banana / no mango?
species.source_line: v23 catalog · Softbill Frugivore class · Iron Storage Disease protocol
species.morning_feed: Low-iron softbill chow weighed first. Fruit ½-inch, low-sugar only. NO citrus / banana / mango.
species.encounter_portion: Single ½-inch fruit cube for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Large terrestrial lizard — South American grasslands
simple_build: Lean ground meat or cooked egg per SOP
species.prep_rule: Protein measured per SOP. No pet food substitute. Tegu is EXEMPT.
species.source_line: v23 PART 4 §11 · Tegu — Protein-Driven Omnivore · Banner corrected to Exempt
species.morning_feed: Lean ground meat or cooked egg per SOP. Whole-leaf greens. Small fruit pieces (½-inch).
species.encounter_portion: Single small protein cube or fruit cube for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.

simple_build: Mazuri insectivore diet in flat bowl
species.prep_rule: Insectivore pellet is the base. Live feeders supplement, not replace.
species.morning_feed: Mazuri insectivore diet flat bowl. Live feeders (mealworms, crickets) per SOP.
species.encounter_portion: Single mealworm for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Arboreal lizard — SE Asian streamside forest
simple_build: Live feeders (crickets, dubia roaches) per SOP — base
species.prep_rule: Live feeders are the base. No daily pellet.
species.source_line: v23 catalog · Insect-leaning omnivore lizard class
species.morning_feed: Live feeders per SOP — base. Small leafy greens. Occasional ½-inch fruit cubes.
species.encounter_portion: Single cricket for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: Mealworms NOT base (chitin too high). Gut-load all feeders before serving.
species.three_second_check: Are live feeders set? Are greens whole-leaf?
species.morning_feed: Gut-loaded live feeders per SOP. Whole-leaf greens (collard, dandelion). Small fruit accent occasional.
species.encounter_portion: No guest hand-feed for chameleons (stress). Tong-delivery by trained keeper only.

species.category: GRAZING TORTOISE — Hay + Grasses + Limited Greens
species.what_this_animal_is: Grazing tortoise — African savanna; STRICT GRAZER, NOT a Sulcata
species.prep_rule: Strict grazer. NO FRUIT. Differs from Sulcata in tolerating limited coarse greens.
species.three_second_check: Is grass hay dominant? Any fruit visible? (should be NONE)
species.source_line: AZA Chelonian TAG · Sulcata/Leopard nutrition guidelines
species.morning_feed: Whole hay pile. Fresh grass cut long. Coarse greens whole. Browse branches.
species.encounter_portion: Single coarse green leaf or grass strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.what_this_animal_is: Steppe tortoise — Central Asia; broadleaf grazer, NOT a hay-only species
wrong: Hay only (this is NOT a Sulcata)
species.prep_rule: NOT a Sulcata — broadleaf greens dominant, hay is secondary. Trace fruit only.
species.three_second_check: Are broadleaf greens dominant? Is hay present?
species.source_line: AZA Chelonian TAG · Testudo nutrition standards
species.morning_feed: Broadleaf greens dominant (dandelion, collard, kale, mulberry). Grass hay secondary. Browse + weeds.
species.encounter_portion: Single dandelion green or mulberry leaf for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.category: RAINFOREST OMNIVORE — Fruit + Greens + Trace Protein
species.what_this_animal_is: Forest tortoise — Amazon basin; fruit-tolerant, hay-intolerant as base
wrong: Hay only (this is NOT a Sulcata)
simple_build: Fruit in 1-inch chunks (papaya, mango, melon, berries)
species.prep_rule: Mazuri Tortoise Diet (LS) 1-2×/week only — NOT daily, NOT base. Trace egg/pellet weekly.
species.three_second_check: Is fruit visible? Is humidity OK?
species.source_line: AZA Chelonian TAG · Chelonoidis denticulatus standards
species.morning_feed: Fruit in 1-inch chunks. Whole-leaf greens. Mazuri tortoise diet 1-2×/week. Trace protein.
species.encounter_portion: Single fruit cube (½ inch) for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
